patch.value: Add pm version and source classification to telemetry payloads

Persisted telemetry currently includes node/platform/runtime data but no explicit pm CLI version key, and aggregate analysis needs a better way to separate test automation, dogfood, audit smoke, and real user sessions.

Telemetry command_start/finish payloads include explicit pm CLI version and privacy-safe source/context classification; aggregate reports can segment automation/test/dogfood/user traffic without raw identifiers.

value.author: cursor-agent
value.text: Duplicate check used pm search for telemetry runtime payload pm version node platform missing version. Existing results covered health diagnostics and closed implementation work but no active schema item for pm version and source classification. Evidence shows runtime node platform keys but no pm version key and many non TTY automation-like installations.
